issues: Indentation errors in compute_signal method cause logic to be incorrect or unreachable.
compute_signal does not handle empty or insufficient data correctly due to indentation.
Position holding logic is nested incorrectly, causing early returns and skipping entry signal check.
Adapter import and usage is correct, output columns used correctly.
Signal to allocation mapping follows spec intent (RISK_ON=BUY 5%, RISK_OFF=SELL no allocation, HOLD no action).
